metadata.title: Hailuo 02 - AI Video Generator | Marble AI
metadata.description: Hailuo 02 by MiniMax. Advanced AI video generation model that turns text or images into short, cinematic clips with high-quality output up to 1080P, realistic motion, and precise camera control.

hero.title: Hailuo 02
hero.description: MiniMax's advanced AI video generation model. Turn text or images into short, cinematic clips with realistic motion and precise camera control.

introduce.title: About Hailuo 02
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Hailuo 02 API is MiniMax's advanced AI video generation model that turns text or images into short, cinematic clips. It supports high-quality output up to 1080P, with realistic motion, physics simulation, and precise camera control.

items.title: Cinematic Clips
items.description: Generate short, cinematic video clips with professional quality.

items.title: Physics Simulation
items.description: Realistic physics simulation for natural motion dynamics.

items.title: Camera Control
items.description: Precise camera control for professional shot composition.

items.title: 1080P Output
items.description: High-quality video output up to 1080P resolution.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover what makes Hailuo 02 a leading AI video generation model.

items.title: What is Hailuo 02?
items.description: Hailuo 02 is MiniMax's advanced AI video generation model with realistic motion and precise camera control.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Hailuo 02 supports Text To Video (T2V), Image To Video (I2V), and Video To Video (V2V) generation modes.

items.title: Who created Hailuo 02?
items.description: Hailuo 02 is created by MiniMax, a leading AI company.

items.title: What makes it unique?
items.description: Hailuo 02 excels at cinematic clips, physics simulation, and precise camera control.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All videos generated with Hailuo 02 through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: What resolution does it support?
items.description: Hailuo 02 supports high-quality output up to 1080P resolution.

cta.title: Ready to Try Hailuo 02?
cta.description: Experience MiniMax's advanced video generation. Create cinematic clips with precise camera control.
